subcodes.first_line: The Most Exalted Pen beareth witness at all times that He is the One God, the Peerless, the Ever-Abiding and Everlasting [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قلم اعلی در کل احیان شهادت میدهد بر اینکه اوست یکتا خداوند بیمانند لم یزل و لایزال
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
